summary.zh: 在共享元素的前后布局之间建立连续形变。
summary.en: Create continuous transformation between before and after layouts of a shared element.

definition.zh: 一个形状平滑地变成另一个形状，例如灵动岛。
definition.en: Interpolated geometry reshapes one visual form into another across a continuous transition.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 选择前后状态保持连续的方式。
description.en: Selects how continuity is preserved between states.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

description.zh: 控制元素相对最终尺寸的起始比例。
description.en: Controls the starting size relative to the final state.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 让一个形状平滑变为另一个形状，并保持对象身份连续。
purpose.en: Turn one shape smoothly into another while preserving object identity.

frequency.zh: 适合低频品牌符号、图标和高价值状态变化；常用控件保持更克制。
frequency.en: Reserve for low-frequency brand marks, icons, and high-value state changes; keep common controls subtler.

trigger.zh: 由对象状态真正改变时触发，前后形状应具有可理解的对应关系。
trigger.en: Trigger when the object's state genuinely changes, with understandable correspondence between shapes.

enterExit.zh: 进入与离开共享同一几何对象和插值路径；复杂路径先统一节点数量。
enterExit.en: Use one geometric object and interpolation path across states, normalizing path points when needed.

interruptibility.zh: 中断时从当前插值形状转向新目标，避免回到任一端点。
interruptibility.en: Retarget from the current interpolated shape instead of returning to an endpoint.

gestureRules.zh: 手势驱动形变要把进度连续映射到输入；离散控件提供键盘切换。
gestureRules.en: Map gesture-driven morph progress continuously to input, with keyboard toggles for discrete controls.

reducedMotion.zh: 使用静态状态替换或短交叉淡化，同时保持对象位置与尺寸连续。
reducedMotion.en: Use a static state replacement or short crossfade while preserving object position and size.

reviewNotes.zh: 明确区分形变、共享元素过渡和布局动画。
reviewNotes.en: Distinguish morphing from shared-element and layout transitions.

reviewNotes.zh: 检查中间形状不会产生自相交或闪烁。
reviewNotes.en: Check intermediate shapes for self-intersection or flicker.
